notes: Performance is Lower than windows in some scenarios but you can put it down to Unity being Unity. The biggest FPS drops are in the puzzle side quest, main campaign runs fine minus the small dungeon horde levels but its all perfectly playable.
title: Cinderella Escape 2 Revenge

notes:
Need to set "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" in launch options or game don't start. 
I have some freezes in cut scene. But generally - it works. Game-pad (logitech) also works.
title: Cinderella Escape 2 Revenge
